## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `coding-agent-kit install --target codex` works in a temporary HOME
- [ ] `coding-agent-kit install --target opencode` works in a temporary HOME
- [ ] `coding-agent-kit status` shows expected files
- [ ] If adding a skill: `description` frontmatter contains real trigger phrases
- [ ] If adding a language overlay: tested that `coding-agent-kit lang <code> --target <target>` applies it correctly
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if needed
